campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign harness on the fixed `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by enforcing downstream-only control-paired comparison first, then testing same-trace checkpoint/export selection, while carrying recurrence handoff and shared-trunk late branching as deferred next mechanisms once the harness exposes the needed primitives.

selected_families.name: Checkpoint And Export Selector Family
selected_families.minimal_probe: From one training trace, evaluate a bounded late-checkpoint window against a fixed small export menu, with 2 controls carrying the published default checkpoint/export choice.
selected_families.expected_signal: A non-default checkpoint/export pair wins on downstream `score_bpb` by more than control spread, and the winner is not recoverable from final-step or pre-quant ranking alone.

selected_families.name: Control-Paired Delta Admission On Downstream Sliding Score
selected_families.minimal_probe: Run one 8-slot frontier selector pack with 2 exact controls, 2 replay-equivalent control clones, and 4 novel slots. Admit only by pack-local delta to paired controls on downstream `quantized_sliding_window` `score_bpb`.
selected_families.expected_signal: Control clones define a stable noise band and at least one non-control clears that band on downstream `score_bpb` without relying on pre-quant ranking.
